message:
Why does your dog spin in three perfect circles before flopping down? 🐕💫 It's an ancient instinct handed down from their wild ancestors. Circling helped them pat down tall grass, chase off any bugs or snakes, and curl into the cozy, safe shape that kept them warm through the night. Your couch potato is still running million-year-old software. 😄🛋️

Comment how many spins YOUR dog does before bed! 🌀🐾
